title: NaN magnitude must be rejected — B-010 regression
description: Direct call into the safe-run path with NaN magnitude. Pre-B-010: physics simulator silently propagated NaN. Post-B-010: validator rejects at boundary with status='invalid' and a NOT_FINITE error on the magnitude field. Result is null; no simulator call is made.

expectedOutputs.comment: When status='invalid', safeRun returns ok=false and result=null. The simulator is never invoked.
